refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level; refining it into sub-FRs focused on key productivity drivers (equipment operation efficiency and task execution efficiency) allows targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that optimized equipment operation and task execution meet or exceed the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation to maximize throughput.
FR2: Optimize task execution efficiency to minimize idle and transition times.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement advanced vehicle control algorithms to maximize operational throughput.
DP2: Implement task scheduling and coordination algorithms to optimize task execution efficiency.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 and DP2 combined to address FR1 and FR2 respectively.

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and task scheduling algorithms.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 and DP2 are logically distinct but require coordination; coupling is manageable with clear interface definitions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of real-time telemetry data for control and scheduling.
Risk that poor coordination between DP1 and DP2 could reduce productivity.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Define clear interface protocols between vehicle control and task scheduling to minimize coupling.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level integration of vehicle control and task scheduling to achieve productivity targets.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Provides real-time operational data from Vehicle to NGHE Solution and feedback for control and scheduling.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task assignments and updates from external planners or operators.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between NGHE Solution and remote modules such as Teleoperation.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of productivity-related DPs; low diffusion risk due to centralized control.
Contains vehicle control DP partially; some diffusion due to embedded control logic.
Minimal containment; mostly external control interface.
No direct containment; safety criticality handled separately.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing productivity-related DPs within NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves coordination.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module due to integration of multiple DPs.
Risk of interface mismatches with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Refine interface definitions and modularize NGHE Solution internally to manage complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Refined FRs are well matched with selected DPs addressing key productivity drivers with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk in Vehicle module due to embedded control logic.
Centralization in NGHE Solution reduces diffusion overall.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as primary ownership boundary for productivity DPs.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and productivity metrics at NGHE Solution level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of productivity functions to NGHE Solution with defined interfaces to Vehicle and Teleoperation.

recommended_revisions: Clarify and formalize interfaces between NGHE Solution and Vehicle modules.
Consider internal modularization within NGHE Solution to handle complexity.

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and assignments are consistent, verifiable, and architecturally sound for proceeding to next design phases.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation to maximize throughput.
FR2: Optimize task execution efficiency to minimize idle and transition times.

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; recommended interface clarifications can be addressed in detailed design.

assumptions: Telemetry data is reliable and timely.
Coordination between vehicle control and task scheduling is feasible.
open_risks: Complexity management within NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Telemetry data quality and latency measurements.
Prototype integration tests between NGHE Solution and Vehicle modules.
